packageRules.description: Auto-merge low-risk updates once CI is green. These are all dev-only tooling or official GitHub Actions; none ship in the plugin's runtime (pure stdlib).
MAJOR version bumps require human review — CI catches breakage but not a malicious-but-passing dependency (supply-chain risk). Renovate opens the PR; Katherine approves.
Pin CI Python: mutmut<3 cannot run on 3.14, so do not bump the workflow python-version.
